description: Direct reference plus literal produces a publication.
Seeded published value matches the local formula result.
Relative path plus direct reference evaluates in dependency order.
Sibling-offset references preserve deterministic dependency order across sibling calculations.
Host-sensitive references emit runtime effects and reject conservatively in the local runtime.
Dynamic-potential references emit runtime effects and reject with dynamic dependency failure in the local runtime.
A resolved dynamic-potential reference publishes through the local runtime and emits dynamic dependency shape evidence.
A relative reference publishes successfully, then a rename edit forces rebind and a post-edit rerun rejects.
A constant-value edit triggers recalc-only impact and a post-edit publication with updated value.
A moved direct-reference target forces rebind on the successor snapshot while preserving publication semantics.
Removing a directly referenced node reports removal and causes the post-edit rerun to reject.
A constant-value edit propagates through a two-formula dependency chain with deterministic rerun order.
A recalc-only structural edit is followed by a host-sensitive rerun that emits runtime effects and overlay sidecars on the successor snapshot.
A capability-sensitive reference emits a capability-sensitive runtime effect and overlay without publishing.
A shape/topology-sensitive reference emits shape-topology runtime effect and overlay without publishing.
A recalc-only structural edit is followed by a capability-sensitive rerun that emits runtime effects and overlay sidecars on the successor snapshot.
A recalc-only structural edit is followed by a shape/topology-sensitive rerun that emits runtime effects and overlay sidecars on the successor snapshot.
An initial published dependency chain becomes a post-edit host-sensitive overlay path after a recalc-only edit flips an IF branch.
A raw OxFml LET/LAMBDA formula captures a direct dependency and publishes through the local TreeCalc runtime.
A raw OxFml LAMBDA invocation with a host-sensitive argument surfaces runtime-effect visibility and rejects locally.
TreeCalc-local counterpart for the TraceCalc accept/publish value surface.
TreeCalc-local counterpart for the TraceCalc multi-node DAG publish surface.
TreeCalc-local value counterpart for the W034 higher-order LET/LAMBDA TraceCalc oracle surface.
TreeCalc-local value counterpart for the W034 replay-equivalent independent-order TraceCalc oracle surface.
